_notes: Goblet Squat. Current: May 11 · 40kg. Previous: Apr 27 · 40kg. Declining trend.

comparison_coaching.summary_paragraph: Your form score dropped 4 points at the same weight compared to your last session. Knee stability has declined and a new tempo issue has emerged in the later reps — focus on controlling your descent before adding more load.

posture.observation_action: Posture held reasonably well but chest position dipped slightly on reps 4 and 5. Reinforce your brace before each rep.

stability.observation_action: Knee valgus has worsened since last session — affecting 4 reps this time vs 3 last time. Prioritise the outward knee cue on every rep.

movement_quality.observation_action: Depth is still good but bar path is less consistent than last session. Slow the descent to regain control.

tempo.observation_action: Tempo has declined noticeably — reps are getting faster as the set progresses. Use a 3-1-2 count to keep it consistent.
